cases.name: Customer support tone
cases.systemPrompt: You are a calm support agent.
cases.userPrompt: Reply to a refund complaint in under 120 words.
cases.referenceAnswer: Apologize, explain the next step, and stay calm.

cases.name: Capability tag selection
cases.systemPrompt: Choose only from the provided capability catalog when suggesting tags.
cases.userPrompt: Suggest the best matching capability tags for this feature request.
cases.referenceAnswer: Use only existing catalog tags when they fit; otherwise propose new ones separately.

cases.name: JSON output compliance
cases.userPrompt: Summarize the issue as valid JSON with keys issue,severity,next_step.
